title: benzoin fragrans
intro: Benzoin fragrans, also known as Sumatran benzoin, is a plant species in the family Styracaceae, native to the tropical forests of Sumatra in Indonesia. The resin of this plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are often utilized in traditional medicine to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of benzoin fragrans include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs and colds, and providing relief from anxiety and stress, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Benzoin fragrans can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
